name: Fish or Chicken Chicken Survivor
short_description: Easy to operate and exhilarating! You control the famous YoutuBird and knock down the approaching Fishs! Clear the tasks on each floor to progress! Survivor-like, but a little different! It's a new kind of rogue light game! That's Fish or Chicken!
detailed_description:
Easy to operate and exhilarating!

You control the famous YoutuBird and knock down the approaching Fish!
Clear the tasks on each floor to progress!
The key to the game is

Stream time x items x number of comments = destructive power!

You can take your time and buy items!
You can challenge the dungeon from early in the morning!
Get through the case safely with support from the viewers!
